user_story: As a tool maintainer, I want CLI and MCP search to share one implementation so behavior stays consistent.
expected_behavior_based_on_code: qlik_search.py and qlik_mcp_server.py both call qlik_index.search and qlik_index.format_hits.

user_story: As a search user, I want useful results even when Chroma cannot open its SQLite database.
expected_behavior_based_on_code: qlik_index.search now falls back to chunks.jsonl lexical retrieval on Chroma exceptions.
initial_result: Initially failed when Chroma opened workspace database and later cache database under sandbox.
errors_documented: Chroma disk I/O error under workspace path; read-only database under sandbox cache path.
fix_applied: Added deterministic JSONL fallback using chunks.jsonl, tags, and query-term scoring.
post_fix_retest: Retest returned 2 advanced passages successfully.

user_story: As a maintainer, I want to build a local Chroma index from chunks.jsonl.
expected_behavior_based_on_code: build_index.py loads chunks and creates a Chroma collection named qlik_knowledge.
initial_result: Initially failed under workspace path with Chroma disk I/O error.
errors_documented: Workspace-local SQLite was unreliable for Chroma in this environment.
fix_applied: Changed default index location to LOCALAPPDATA cache and created parent directories before Chroma startup.
post_fix_retest: Retest built 498 chunks to C:\Users\sean_\AppData\Local\qlik-ai-skill\index\chroma_db.

user_story: As a maintainer, I want rebuilds in alternate output directories to reuse the bundled local ONNX model.
expected_behavior_based_on_code: build_index.py passes LocalONNXEmbeddingFunction a model dir, and qlik_index validates complete ONNX model files.
test_performed: Built index to a temp output directory during diagnosis.
initial_result: Initially attempted network download when alternate outdir had an incomplete model folder.
errors_documented: Incomplete outdir/model folder was treated as valid because only folder existence was checked.
fix_applied: Added _model_ready check for required ONNX files and fallback to bundled tool/model.
post_fix_retest: Retest built temp index successfully with 498 chunks and no model download.
